scope: Evidence-Native Marketplace v1 regression coverage over local registry validation, verify-on-consume, tamper detection, provenance lineage, and Milestone 25 provenance-bundle backward compatibility.
generatedStatePolicy: Generated runs, replay workspaces, dashboard exports, temporary files, browser profiles, command logs, and local tool state remain ignored unless explicitly fixture-scoped. This matrix and its fixtures are tracked source-like regression artifacts.

backwardCompatibility.note: The Milestone 25 provenance bundle remains valid standalone, independent of the marketplace registry.
